title: paspalum rupium
intro: Paspalum rupium, also known as P. scrobiculatum, is a type of grass species belonging to the Poaceae family, commonly found in tropical and subtropical regions. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits associated with Paspalum rupium include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and treating respiratory problems such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions due to its medicinal properties.
